parameter_lock_registry.description: Frozen parameters for all future datasets in the replication pipeline. These parameters MUST NOT be modified for any external dataset. Any modification requires a new Phase entry and explicit documentation.

seed.rule: Seed 42 is the primary. Replication studies may add seeds 0, 100, 1000 but seed 42 must always be run.

omega_distribution.note: Frequency distribution may vary by dataset; all other RNG rules are fixed

integrator.forbidden_alternative: Runge-Kutta 4th order (RK4) — different integrator is a separate experiment, not a replication

steps.note: STEPS is variable by dataset but must be reported; STEPS < 500 triggers INCONCLUSIVE flag

transient.value: transient must be reported; 300 minimum recommended
transient.note: TRANSIENT is variable but must be documented; no 'auto-detect' transient without documentation

trials.rule: All estimators (chi, Binder, tau) require minimum 4 trials; single-trial datasets are flagged INCONCLUSIVE

coupling_form.value: mean-field Kuramoto: dθ_i/dt = ω_i - (K/N) Σ_j sin(θ_i - θ_j)
coupling_form.forbidden_variant: any coupling form that is not mean-field (e.g., Kuramoto-Sakaguchi with phase shift)

order_parameter.value: R = |Z| where Z = (1/N) Σ_j exp(i θ_j)
order_parameter.forbidden_variant: correlation matrices, Hilbert transforms, FFT of trajectories, alternative order parameters

R_window.value: mean over last 20% of simulation steps [TRANSIENT:STEPS]
R_window.rule: R is the temporal mean over the measurement window; no temporal optimization (e.g., running mean) permitted

K_range.value: K from 0 to minimum 3.0; recommended 0 to 4.0
K_range.note: K range may vary but must be reported; K range < 0 to 3.0 triggers INCONCLUSIVE flag

K_resolution.rule: Fewer than 15 K points triggers FAIL on F1 criterion

definition.value: chi(K,N) = N * Var(R_trial for trial in [1, TRIALS])

chi.note: Trial variance only (not temporal variance); TRIALS = 4 minimum
chi.forbidden_variant: temporal variance of R(t) within a single trial

identification.value: maximum chi(K) across all K values

chi_peak.note: No automated peak-finding algorithm; visual or manual identification only

definition.value: log-log regression: log(chi_peak) = gamma * log(N) + const

gamma.note: Minimum 3 N values required; R2 reported; no error bars

binder.note: Computed from trial means; minimum 4 trials; parameter-sensitive (STEPS-dependent)
binder.forbidden_variant: Renyi entropy, correlation matrix eigenvalues, any alternative cumulant

identification.value: minimum U4(K) across all K values

binder_min.note: No automated peak-finding; visual or manual identification only

definition.value: first t where R_t >= threshold * R_final; threshold = 0.90 * mean(last 50 steps)

tau.note: NOT autocorrelation time; 90% threshold is arbitrary
tau.forbidden_variant: autocorrelation time (not computed in any Phase 252-256 script)

tau_stability.note: tau saturates at 50 when stability criterion not met within STEPS; this is a known limitation

hysteresis_loop_area.note: Threshold is ARBITRARY with no theoretical basis; threshold < 0.15 -> CONTINUOUS; threshold >= 0.15 -> HYSTERETIC

backward.value: final theta from forward sweep (COUPLED — known limitation)

hysteresis_init.note: Backward sweep is NOT independently initialized; this is a documented limitation, not a parameter to 'fix'

all_to_all.value: mean-field coupling: dθ_i/dt = ω_i - (K/N) Σ_j sin(θ_i - θ_j)

erdos_renyi.value: adjacency matrix A_ij ~ Bernoulli(p); dθ_i/dt = ω_i - (K/N) Σ_j A_ij sin(θ_i - θ_j)

coupling_scaling.value: K direct (not normalized by average degree in Phase 253)
coupling_scaling.note: Phase 253 used K direct; alternative scaling is a separate experiment

scale_free.note: Not tested in Phase 253; may be tested in future datasets

small_world.note: Not tested in Phase 253; may be tested in future datasets

Kc.note: NOT estimated from fit; ASSUMED from literature and peak location

nu.value: nu = 2.0 from literature (not estimated from data)
nu.note: nu assumed, not fitted; no optimization attempted in Phase 252-8

optimization.note: No least-squares collapse optimization performed; RMS deviation not computed

forbidden_actions: Introduce new order parameters (S, m2, correlation matrices, Hilbert transforms, FFT)
Replace tau with autocorrelation time (not computed in Phase 252-256)
Replace chi with temporal variance (not computed in Phase 252-256)
Replace Binder with alternative cumulant (not computed in Phase 252-256)
Adjust loop_area threshold from 0.15 (arbitrary but frozen)
Change RNG seed to target specific outcomes
Retune K range, N, or STEPS to match Phase 252-256 results
